summary.description: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.
summary.selection_rule: Pick the three smallest next steps that increase reliability more than they increase context cost.
summary.recommended_now_why: The package needs clearer near-neighbor exclusions before it grows.

directions.title: Tighten trigger and exclusions
directions.why: The package needs clearer near-neighbor exclusions before it grows.
actions: Add 3 to 5 should-trigger and should-not-trigger examples.
Refine the frontmatter description to name the recurring job and non-goals.
Run a first trigger evaluation pass before expanding the package.
directions.unlocks: Cleaner routing and fewer accidental activations.
directions.wait_on: Wait to add broader structure until this move clearly improves reliability.

directions.title: Add the first execution asset
directions.why: The package is still mostly prose. Add one asset that removes repeated manual work.
actions: Move stable procedural guidance into references if users will need it repeatedly.
Create one deterministic helper script if a repeated step can be executed instead of described.
Keep the main SKILL.md compact and route-oriented.
directions.unlocks: Stronger execution quality without bloating the entrypoint.
directions.do_now: Do this after the first move lands cleanly.
directions.wait_on: Wait until the package has evidence that this extra structure is justified.

directions.title: Create an iteration evidence loop
directions.why: The package should show what changed and why after the first draft.
actions: Generate the HTML skill report and keep it aligned with the package.
Record reference scan choices and non-goals.
Capture the next iteration choice explicitly before adding more files.
directions.unlocks: A clearer path for the next author or reviewer.
directions.do_now: Do this after the first move lands cleanly.
directions.wait_on: Wait until the package has evidence that this extra structure is justified.
